name: jcrt
description: Journal for Cultural and Religious Theory: A Whitestone Foundation Publication

scripts.start: npm run sitemaps:generate && cross-env ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=serve NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eleventy --serve
scripts.build:local: npm run sitemaps:generate && npm run check:bootstrap-sourcemap && cross-env FAST_BUILD=1 LEAN_BUILD=1 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=serve NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eleventy --quiet && npm run check:icons
scripts.build:bench: cross-env BENCH_11TY=1 BENCH_ISSUE=24.2 FAST_BUILD=1 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=serve NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 eleventy --quiet
scripts.build: npm run sitemaps:generate && rm -rf _site && cross-env SKIP_IMAGE_PROCESSING=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy && npm run sitemaps:check && npm run oai:validate && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node _config/run-pagefind.js
scripts.build:netlify:full: npm run sitemaps:generate && rm -rf _site && echo "[build:netlify 1/4] Eleventy" && cross-env SKIP_IMAGE_PROCESSING=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy --quiet && echo "[build:netlify 2/4] Sitemap checks" && npm run sitemaps:check && echo "[build:netlify 3/4] OAI validation (full)" && npm run oai:validate:full && echo "[build:netlify 4/4] Pagefind" && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node _config/run-pagefind.js
scripts.build:netlify:fast: npm run sitemaps:generate && rm -rf _site && echo "[build:netlify fast 1/3] Eleventy" && cross-env SKIP_IMAGE_PROCESSING=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy --quiet && echo "[build:netlify fast 2/3] Sitemap checks" && npm run sitemaps:check && echo "[build:netlify fast 3/3] OAI validation (quick)" && npm run oai:validate:quick
scripts.build:fast: rm -rf _site && cross-env SKIP_IMAGE_PROCESSING=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy --incremental && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096 node _config/run-pagefind.js
scripts.perf:benchmark:lean: cross-env DEBUG=Eleventy:Benchmark* FAST_BUILD=1 LEAN_BUILD=1 ELEVENTY_RUN_MODE=build eleventy --quiet
